chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1216 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 None present nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2021 and it was lastly fixed in Court on 12.08.2021 where on that date, following order was passed:- “Petitioner present in person has restricted his grievance to the extent of issuance of Death Certificate of his said late father by respondent No.7. In the present circumstances, let notice be issued to respondent No.7 only for 15.09.2021, when representative of respondent No.7 shall be in attendance without fail.” Thereafter the petitioner has not persuaded his petition nor attempted to fix the matter before Court. It shows that the petitioner has lost his interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
